title: Remove random fullscreen image and hide globe text in global mode

requirements.summary: Remove the random/unintended image that appears in fullscreen mode
acceptanceCriteria: No unexpected or unintended image is visible when the app enters fullscreen mode
The fullscreen overlay renders only intentional elements (globe, visualizer, station info, slogans)

file_operations.description: Remove or conditionally exclude any unintended image element (e.g., an img tag, background-image, or asset reference) that renders in fullscreen mode. Ensure only the FullscreenGlobe, AudioVisualizer, station info, and slogans are rendered.

requirements.summary: Hide text content in GlobeView to prevent conflict with AppHeader in global mode
acceptanceCriteria: When the Globe view is active, no text from GlobeView (e.g., labels, overlays, tooltips at rest) overlaps or conflicts with the AppHeader top bar
The GlobeView text/overlay elements are hidden or suppressed while in global mode
The 3D globe itself and interactive markers remain visible and functional

file_operations.description: Hide or suppress text elements (e.g., hover tooltips, labels, overlays) rendered by GlobeView that conflict with the AppHeader top bar. Ensure the 3D globe and interactive station markers remain fully visible and functional. Consider adding conditional rendering logic or CSS adjustments to hide text-only content when the Globe view is active.
